title: pelargonium × megalostictum
intro: Pelargonium × megalostictum, also known as the 'White Rose' or 'Malville Rose', is a popular and versatile ornamental plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, often grown for its attractive white flowers and fragrant leaves. The leaves and flowers of this plant are rich in antioxidants and have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their medicinal properties. The plant is known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which have been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of Pelargonium × megalostictum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal benefits.
